description: Smoke 1: operator types 'list findings'; mallcop agent calls list-findings and renders the result in the required format.

prerequisites.operator_deployment: mallcop agent must be deployed with operator campfire configured and mallcop-sk-* key provisioned
prerequisites.note: LLM smoke cannot be run without operator deployment. See smoke_prerequisites below.

smoke_prerequisites: Forge running and reachable at FORGE_BASE_URL
mallcop agent deployed with a valid operator campfire
at least one finding seeded in the operator's Forge account
mallcop-sk-* API key with operator scope

expected_tool_call.note: agent MUST call list-findings before rendering — no guessing from context

expected_output_format.overflow_message: and N more — ask for details on any

replay_instructions: POST operator_input.campfire_message to the operator campfire; verify list-findings tool call in agent trace; verify output matches expected_output_format.
